subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! The Lord of existence maketh mention of thee from His glorious station, and announceth unto thee the glad-tidings of God's loving-kindness, the Mighty, the All-Loving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمود یذکرک مالک الوجود فی مقامه المحمود و یبشرک بعنایه الله العزیز الودود
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @power of the Manifestation of God
